name: DR.COM 模板
description: 适用于 DR.COM / 深澜 / 常见 Web 认证页面，通过表单提交判断结果

steps.description: 填写账号（兼容 DDDDD 字段）
steps.script: (() => { const val = '{{username}}'.trim(); if (!val) throw new Error('账号为空'); const el = document.querySelector("input[name='DDDDD'], input[name='username'], input[name='userId']"); if (!el) throw new Error('找不到账号输入框'); const nativeSet=Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(HTMLInputElement.prototype,'value').set; nativeSet.call(el,val); el.dispatchEvent(new Event('input',{bubbles:true})); el.dispatchEvent(new Event('change',{bubbles:true})); return true; })()

steps.description: 填写密码（兼容 upass 字段）
steps.script: (() => { const val = '{{password}}'.trim(); if (!val) throw new Error('密码为空'); const el = document.querySelector("input[name='upass'], input[name='password'], input[type='password']"); if (!el) throw new Error('找不到密码输入框'); const nativeSet=Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(HTMLInputElement.prototype,'value').set; nativeSet.call(el,val); el.dispatchEvent(new Event('input',{bubbles:true})); el.dispatchEvent(new Event('change',{bubbles:true})); return true; })()

steps.description: 选择运营商（下拉框 / 单选按钮 / 按钮组，无值自动跳过）
steps.script: (() => { const isp = String('{{isp}}' || '').trim(); if (!isp) return true; const vis = el => { if(!el) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); if(!s||s.display==='none'||s.visibility==='hidden') return false; const r=el.getBoundingClientRect(); return r.width>1&&r.height>1; }; const norm = s => String(s||'').replace(/\s+/g,'').toLowerCase(); const want = norm(isp); const carrierKw = /移动|联通|电信|铁通|教育网|cmcc|cucc|ctcc|cernet|mobile|unicom|telecom/i; const sels = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll("select[name='ISP_select'], select[name='isp'], select[name='ISP']")).filter(vis); for (const sel of sels) { const opts = Array.from(sel.options||[]); let best=null, bestS=-999; for (const o of opts) { const t = norm([o.textContent,o.label,o.value].filter(Boolean).join(' ')); let s=0; if (t.includes(want)||want.includes(t)) s+=30; if (carrierKw.test(t)) s+=6; if (/请选择|--/.test(t)) s-=5; if (s>bestS){bestS=s;best=o;} } if (best&&bestS>=10){sel.value=best.value;sel.dispatchEvent(new Event('change',{bubbles:true}));return true;} } const radios = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('input[type=radio]')).filter(vis); if (radios.length >= 2) { const pool = radios.filter(r => { const label = r.labels&&r.labels[0]?r.labels[0].innerText:''; const ctx = [r.name,r.id,r.value,label].filter(Boolean).join(' '); return carrierKw.test(ctx); }); const use = pool.length>=2 ? pool : radios; let best=null, bestS=-999; for (const r of use) { const label = r.labels&&r.labels[0]?r.labels[0].innerText:''; const t = norm([r.value,label,r.parentElement&&r.parentElement.innerText].filter(Boolean).join(' ')); let s=0; if (t.includes(want)||want.includes(t)) s+=30; if (carrierKw.test(t)) s+=6; if (s>bestS){bestS=s;best=r;} } if (best&&bestS>=5){best.click();return true;} } const clickables = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('li,label,span,div,a,button')).filter(el => { if (!vis(el)) return false; const t = norm(el.innerText); return carrierKw.test(t) && el.children.length <= 3; }); if (clickables.length >= 2) { const parent = clickables[0].parentElement; const siblings = parent ? Array.from(parent.children).filter(vis) : clickables; let best=null, bestS=-999; for (const el of siblings) { const t = norm(el.innerText); let s=0; if (t.includes(want)||want.includes(t)) s+=30; if (carrierKw.test(t)) s+=6; if (s>bestS){bestS=s;best=el;} } if (best&&bestS>=5){best.click();return true;} } return true; })()
(() => { const btn = document.querySelector("input[name='0MKKey'], input[type='submit'], button[type='submit']"); if (!btn) throw new Error('找不到登录按钮'); btn.click(); return true; })()

(() => { const urlChanged = location.href !== (window.__preUrl || ''); if (urlChanged) return true; const body = (document.body.innerText || ''); const diff = Math.abs(body.length - (window.__preBody || '').length); if (diff > 100) return true; const t = (body + ' ' + document.title).toLowerCase(); const fail = ['密码错误','密码不正确','密码有误','账号不存在','账号或密码','用户不存在','认证失败','登录失败','error','failed','invalid','incorrect']; for (const w of fail) { if (t.includes(w.toLowerCase())) return false; } const ok = ['登录成功','认证成功','已连接','已上线','success','connected','online']; if (ok.some(w => t.toLowerCase().includes(w.toLowerCase()))) return true; const msg = document.querySelector('#msg, .err_msg, [id*=result], [class*=result]'); if (msg) { const mt = msg.innerText.toLowerCase(); if (fail.some(w => mt.includes(w.toLowerCase()))) return false; } return false; })()
